rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Prior Order Sanctioning Respondent $1,035; Memo P/A; Declaration
rulings.Rulings: The motion for reconsideration is denied. Mr. Reed raises no new facts that could not have been presented in a timely opposition to the original motion and no legitimate basis to excuse his failure to present his arguments at that time. Even had he done so, the award of sanctions would still have been appropriate given all the circumstances of the case. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:30 p.m. Wednesday, October 7, 2015.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Compel Complete Answers To Discovery And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
rulings.Rulings: This matter is off calendar per the request of the moving party.
